tiles.marketRegimeHelper: Derived from the live signal inventory

topSignals.title: Top active signals
topSignals.description: Ranked by confidence — the strongest actionable setups across the whole universe.
topSignals.emptyDescription: The deterministic engine isn't firing setups in the current regime — it won't manufacture them. Regime and the live market grid below are still active.
topSignals.errorDescription: The signal feed could not be loaded.

grid.title: The whole corridor · {{count}} symbols
grid.description: Every tracked symbol with price, change, and a closed-candle sparkline. Click any cell to open it.
grid.emptyDescription: No corridor data yet — it fills in as the backend ingests.
grid.errorDescription: Corridor prices could not be loaded.

paperAccount.title: Paper account
paperAccount.empty: No open positions. Fills from the paper ticket land here.

brief.title: Morning brief
brief.footer: Narrated from the engine's own reads — regimes, signals, risk. Never advice.

signals.title: Filterable signal inventory
signals.description: Current and historical signals with setup type, expectancy, status, and direct routing to the symbol detail screen or signal drawer. Signal records are generated from stored market corridor candles on the backend.
signals.feedErrorDetail: The list below may be stale or empty because the backend is failing, not because there are no signals.
signals.lockedNotice: Expert-layer signals locked: {{count}} — unlocks with Academy expert readiness
signals.emptyTitle: No signals match the current filter
signals.emptyDescription: Try broadening the market, status, or confidence filters to repopulate the backend-generated table.
signals.errorDescription: The backend signal inventory could not be loaded.

schema.title: Schema summary
schema.description: The table above derives from the same field-for-field canonical signal object shown in the signal detail drawer.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.tagline: Paper venue · fills and exits on closed candles · never financial advice.

notice.closed: {{symbol}} closed at the latest market price.

positions.empty: No open positions. Fills land here; stops and targets exit them automatically.
positions.scaleOut: Scale out: close half the position at the latest closed price

orders.empty: No working orders. Limit and stop entries wait here until price reaches them, expire by their time-in-force, or are cancelled.

history.empty: No closed trades yet. Every exit — stop, target, trailing, or manual — is recorded here with its realized P&L and R multiple.

language.title: Language
language.label: Display language
language.help: Choose the language for the app interface. AI insights answer in this language too.

common.notFinancialAdvice: Educational use only — not financial advice.
